title: The Path of Excellence
overview: Sophie is a brilliant student. Encouraged by her maths teacher, she leaves the family farm to attend a science preparatory class. Between new encounters, successes and failures, and faced with fierce competition, Sophie realizes that her dream of joining the Polytechnique represents more than an entrance examination but a true challenge of social climbing.

trailers.title: LA VOIE ROYALE de Frédéric Mermoud - Bande-annonce - au cinéma le 9 août
